content: Narayanaswamy in September 2013 at Narada Gana Sabha in Chennai 39 2014 Isai Selvam Award Presented by Karunanidhi under the banner of Muthamizh Peravai on 24 January 2014 in Chennai 40 2017 "Tamil Isai Thilakam" Title Presented by New York Tamil Sangam on 28 May 2017 2017 Sangeetha Choodamani Award Sri Krishna Gana Sabha, conferred by E
